_comment: Allowlist for IPC surface audit's --check mode. Lists currently-accepted entries in concerning classes (dead / widget-passthru / phantom). New entries that aren't on this list fail CI; stale entries (channel reclassified or removed) just warn. Refresh by running `node scripts/audit-ipc-surface.js --write-allowlist` after a deliberate change. Do not hand-edit casually — every entry is a security-stack acknowledgement that this surface is acceptable as-is.
